we need to redesign this landing page, make it look modern for SaaS software.

based on the existing design, re-design the app to look more moden, support light/dark theme and also support dual languange english and malay (ms)

    Reading to Edit the file? Read is correct — Edit needs the exact bytes in your conversation to match against.
    Reading to analyze, summarize, or extract from the file? Use context-mode_ctx_execute_file(path, language, code) — the bytes stay in the sandbox and only what your code prints enters your conversation.
